'''ngathufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaeomysticete|chaeomysticete]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-th-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaeomysticete|chaeomysticete]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngathufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæthifith|ngæthifith]] || [[word:ngæthifij|ngæthifij]] || [[word:ngæthifish|ngæthifish]] || [[word:ngæthifi|ngæthifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngathuthufuth|ngathuthufuth]] || [[word:ngathuthufuj|ngathuthufuj]] || [[word:ngathuthufush|ngathuthufush]] || [[word:ngathuthufu|ngathuthufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngathufuth|ngathufuth]] || [[word:ngathufuj|ngathufuj]] || [[word:ngathufush|ngathufush]] || [[word:ngathufu|ngathufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngathuffuth|ngathuffuth]] || [[word:ngathuffuj|ngathuffuj]] || [[word:ngathuffush|ngathuffush]] || [[word:ngathuffuf|ngathuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngathufuthu|ngathufuthu]] || [[word:ngathufuju|ngathufuju]] || [[word:ngathufushu|ngathufushu]] || [[word:ngathufuku|ngathufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngathufuth|ngathufuth]] || [[word:ngathufuj|ngathufuj]] || [[word:ngathufush|ngathufush]] || [[word:ngathufu|ngathufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngathufuthul|ngathufuthul]] || [[word:ngathufujul|ngathufujul]] || [[word:ngathufushul|ngathufushul]] || [[word:ngathufukul|ngathufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngathufuthuthu|ngathufuthuthu]] || [[word:ngathufujuju|ngathufujuju]] || [[word:ngathufushushu|ngathufushushu]] || [[word:ngathufuku|ngathufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngathufuthun|ngathufuthun]] || [[word:ngathufujun|ngathufujun]] || [[word:ngathufushun|ngathufushun]] || [[word:ngathufukun|ngathufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngathufuthuoro|ngathufuthuoro]] || [[word:ngathufujuoro|ngathufujuoro]] || [[word:ngathufushuoro|ngathufushuoro]] || [[word:ngathufukuoro|ngathufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
